title: Dragon Egg Tracker
description: Track the Dragon Egg by crafting a compass. Gives Buffs to Dragon Egg Holder

# 🐉 DragonEggTracker

**Turn the Dragon Egg into a Server-Wide Trophy**

*Live Tracking • Tracker Compass • Egg Holder Buffs • Movement Control*

<iframe width="100%" height="400" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/_W3RaAus2RU"></iframe>

---

## 🔥 Overview

The Dragon Egg just sits there by default — a decoration with no real meaning. **DragonEggTracker changes that.**

The moment a player picks up the egg, the entire server knows. They become the **owner**, gain powerful buffs, and can be hunted down using a craftable **Tracker Compass** that always points to the egg's location. Every placement, pickup, and drop is tracked and persisted across restarts.

> *"Finally a reason to actually fight over the Dragon Egg."* — Server Admin

---

## ⚡ Features

### 🧭 Tracker Compass
Craft a special compass that **always points to the Dragon Egg**, no matter where it is.
- Uses Minecraft's native lodestone mechanic — **zero performance impact**
- Configurable update interval
- Optionally disable tracking while the owner is offline

### 📣 Pickup Announcement
When someone claims the egg, the **entire server is notified** with a customizable broadcast and the Ender Dragon's roar.
- Fully configurable message with `%player%` placeholder
- Sound effect toggleable in config

### ✨ Egg Holder Buffs
The egg owner gets **rewarded for holding their trophy** — and loses everything when they drop it.
- Configurable **extra hearts**
- Configurable **potion effects** (Strength, Fire Resistance, etc.)
- Buffs are **removed automatically** when the egg is dropped or the player logs off

### 🔒 Movement Restrictions
Prevent the egg from being **hidden or smuggled** through automation.
- Hoppers and dispensers are **fully blocked**
- Configure which containers the egg can be stored in
- Optionally disallow ender chests

### 🛡️ Prevent Dragon Egg from being destroyed
prevents egg being destroyed by any means
- Cant be destroyed by cactus, anvil fall, fire. etc.
- If egg falls in lava it gets teleported to a safe location and coords will be announced in chat

---

## 📦 What's Included

| Feature | Status |
|---|---|
| Live Egg Location Tracking | ✅ |
| Craftable Tracker Compass | ✅ |
| Egg Ownership System | ✅ |
| Server Pickup Announcement | ✅ |
| Egg Holder Buffs (Hearts + Potions) | ✅ |
| Hopper / Dispenser Blocking | ✅ |
| Configurable Container Restrictions | ✅ |
| Data Persistence Across Restarts | ✅ |

---

## 🚀 Quick Start

1. **Download** `DragonEggTracker.jar`
2. **Drop** it into `/plugins`
3. **Restart** your server
4. **(Optional)** Edit `config.yml` to tune buffs, containers, and the compass recipe

**That's it.** Zero configuration required to start.

---

## 🎮 Commands & Permissions

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| `/dragon help` | Show all commands |
| `/dragon owner` | See who holds the Dragon Egg |
| `/dragon recipe` | Preview the Tracker Compass recipe |
| `/dragon locate` | Get the egg's exact coordinates *(Admin)* |
| `/dragon reload` | Reload config without restart *(Admin)* |

Also available as `/dragoneggtracker` and `/det`

**Permissions:**
- `dragoneggtracker.admin` — Access to locate & reload *(default: op)*
- `dragoneggtracker.craft` — Craft the Tracker Compass *(default: true)*

---
